blockingIssues.description: Line 107: ExtractionConfig defaults store_path to `.skills` but AGENTS.md specifies user-extensible skills should be in `.swell/skills/`. Extracted skills will not be discoverable by the system's skill discovery mechanism. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 6).

Line 139: TrajectoryAnalyzer has #[allow(dead_code)] attribute and its store field is never used for database lookups. The analyzer only processes input trajectory in memory without querying historical data. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 6).
Line 955: Confidence calculation uses sum of all pattern frequencies (frequency_map.values().sum()) as denominator instead of per-pattern frequency. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 6).

Line 1145: Convention parsing uses wrong string slice index [3..] instead of [4..]. For input '- **name**: description', position 0='-', 1=' ', 2='*', 3='*', 4='n'. Name starts at index 4. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 6).
Line 1173: get_anti_patterns_for_error is an unimplemented stub returning empty vec with comment 'For MVP, return empty'. STILL NOT FIXED since round 1 (now round 6).
blockingIssues.evidence: crates/swell-memory/src/pattern_learning.rs lines 1173-1176: Ok(Vec::new()) with 'For MVP, return empty' comment

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: CRITICAL: These blocking issues have persisted for 6 rounds without resolution. The orchestrator should create dedicated fix features for each blocking issue rather than expecting implementation workers to self-correct. The issues are: (1) memory-skill-extraction store_path should be `.swell/skills/`, (2) memory-skill-extraction TrajectoryAnalyzer dead code, (3) memory-pattern-learning confidence calculation, (4) memory-pattern-learning convention parsing slice index, (5) memory-pattern-learning anti-pattern stub.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 5 issues marked 'STILL NOT FIXED' in rounds 1-6. No progress has been made despite multiple review cycles.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The skill store path convention is unclear: skill extraction outputs to `.skills/` but AGENTS.md documents `.swell/skills/` as the user-extensible skill directory. Clarify the intended behavior: (a) skill_extraction.rs should use `.swell/skills/` as the default store path, or (b) AGENTS.md should document both locations with different purposes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: memory-skill-extraction stores to `.skills/` (line 125) but AGENTS.md line ~210 states 'Users can add new skills to .swell/skills/ - no code changes needed.'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The convention parsing format used internally by memory-pattern-learning is not documented anywhere. This markdown format with '### TypeName' headers and '- **name**: description' bullet points should be documented in shared state if workers are expected to follow it.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: pattern_learning.rs lines 1130-1146 show parsing expects specific markdown format. No documentation exists in AGENTS.md or library.

rejectedObservations.observation: memory-pattern-learning review suggested a skill for anti-pattern extraction methodology should exist
rejectedObservations.reason: Skill creation is out of scope for memory milestone fixes - this is a future improvement, not a blocking issue
